headline: Trump 🍊🔥 YEETS Powell 🚫💼 Unless He Bounces May 15th! 💥
text:
MAG A Daddy Trump 🍊👑 straight-up THREATENING 🗡️ to AXE 🔥 Fed Chair Jerome 'Knucklehead' Powell 🤡💰 if he doesn't GTFO by May 15th 📅🚪 – latest BEEF 🥩💥 in their endless RATE-CUT ROAST FEST 🔥📉! Trump on Fox Biz 📺🦊: 'I've been HOLDING BACK 🤏 from FIRING his ASS 🍑, but if he clings like a BAD HIRE 🐒, then BOOM 💣 – you're OUTTA HERE!' Powell's term DIES 📈➡️📉 on 5/15 but he's plotting to SQUAT 🏠🚫 till successor Kevin Warsh 🧔📈 gets Senate STAMPED 👌 – law says he can LINGER like a ghost 👻 till confirmed!

GOP Drama Queens 👯‍♂️💅: Thom Tillis 🚫🛑, big-shot Senate RINO on Fed noms, BLOCKING Warsh 🚧 unless DOJ drops CRIMINAL PROBE 🔍🚨 into Powell's BILLION-DOLLAR Fed HQ RENOVATION SPREE 🏗️💸💥 – Trump calls it 'TENS OF MILLIONS MAX' but Powell blew it like a BAD BET 🎰🤦‍♂️! Senate Boss John Thune 🇺🇸🗳️ wants probe WRAPPED 🎁: 'Best for EVERYONE 😌!' Mike Rounds 📢 chimes in: 'This witch hunt ain't SERVING Trump’s CHAIR SWAP GOALS 🎯👨‍💼!' Trump hoping Tillis 'knows what to do 🇺🇸' but NOPE on dropping probe: 'Gotta DIG 🔎 what went DOWN there!'

Treasury Hype Man Scott Bessent 💼😎 'VERY OPTIMISTIC' Warsh sails through by May: 'Tillis LOVES Warsh 🥰, let's HEARINGS GO BRRR 📢🚀!' Flashback: Trump PICKED Powell in 2017 😍 'steady leader!' but NOW it's 'LOUSY JOB' 😡 after ignoring CUT RATES BEGS 🙏📉 – markets DIPPED 📉💸 and Dollar WEAK AF 🤑➡️😩 when 2025 firing whispers leaked! Trump backpedals: 'HIGHLY UNLIKELY unless FRAUD 🍆🚫!' Firing a Fed Chair? TOTAL PRECEDENT SMASHER 💥🔥 – first EVER! Biden re-upped him 2021 but Trump’s like 'MY FED NOW 🍑🇺🇸!' Powell staying TILLIS-BLOCKED? Trump’s pink slip LOADING... 😈💨 – Wall Street SWEATING 😰📈 if Donnie pulls the TRIGGER 🔫 on this Fed FED-UP FIESTA 🎉🤡!
